title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 436.330 - Subcontractor obligations
text:
436.330.  Subcontractor obligations. — Subcontractors and sub-subcontractors of every tier shall comply with the provisions of sections 436.300 to 436.336 in their relations with their sub-subcontractors and suppliers and shall be bound by the same obligations to their sub-subcontractors and suppliers as contractors are to their subcontractors.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1403)
